title: senecio pinceus
intro: Senecio pinceus, also known as Ponce's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family native to the western Canary Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a hepatoprotective agent and an anti-inflammatory. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing liver damage and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, Senecio pinceus is typically dried and used as an herbal tea or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
